{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034528C9B9E66428B92FB84DBB"}"},"total":3986},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6897017029053202447","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔不错，也是我喜欢的风格，尤其是主角那性格：“杀戮不能解决问题，但能解决提出问题的人”。世家使绊子，暗中勾结北方游牧，杀；丞相暗中收受贿赂，提议和亲，杀；当然也不是无脑杀，对于魏征这种忠正之人有容人之量。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1605836925,"group_id":"6882968548528884744","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwXpsaBeVHKAk6k0LCVtgpE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"17778226174","user_name":"悬冠兰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"17778226174","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741387885,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6882968548528884744","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越唐朝，成为不存在历史中的李世民长子。
天生痴傻的李文昊终于在李元霸的葬礼上觉醒了。
民间传说，将不过李，王不过霸，但是开局摸了天下无敌李元霸的尸体，李文昊会有多猛？
惹事，他从来不怕。
打架，他从来不虚。
作死，他更是一流。
拼爹？
呵呵！
